description: Create a content slide on technological risk perceptions with a scatter chart in a sidebar-right layout, showing global risk landscape positions and a right-hand callout on younger generations perceiving higher risk.

header.headline: The relationship of humans with machines is fraught with technological risk – Risk perception regarding innovations in the younger generation are higher
header.sub: Global risks landscape for technological risks

main.title: Global risks landscape for technological risks

sidebar.body: Younger generations perceive innovation-related technological risks as higher, underscoring a fraught relationship between humans and machines.
